title: I hit the bottle a couple hours ago,
content:
I hit the bottle a couple hours ago,
Met a little girl who wants to take it
nice and slow.
I hit the bottle a couple hours ago,
Met a little girl, says she goes down
real low.

Hounds of Hell in the summer night,
Been asleep for months, feeling alright,
Hounds of Hell slipping out of sight,
Running down to the city of night.

I hit the bottle just a minute ago,
Walking in circles, walking to and fro.
I hit the bottle just a minute ago,
What's the difference when you're
feeling really low?
context: From document: I hit the bottle a couple hours ago,
